Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Video.summary: Hunter helps a distressed war buddy look for the kidnappers of his mail-order bride - CHARLES HALLAHAN stars.
Video.title: The Jade Woman

Video.summary: Rachel's in labor and about to give birth at any minute with only Cyd to support her because Tony is literally out on a ledge trying to stop a troubled, older cop, who is a friend, from jumping.
Video.title: A Time To Be Born

Video.summary: McCall is charged with murder when the prime suspect in her dead detective husband's case is found dead.
Video.title: Requiem For Sergeant McCall

Video.summary: A hit man sets up Rachel when Tony refuses to release a mob informer from jail.
Video.title: The Set-Up

Video.summary: Tony, distraught when it appears that Phil Reid, one of his best men, may be targeted for revenge by a dangerous escaped convict.
Video.title: Escape

Video.summary: Private eye Tony turns his sights on his old department.
Video.title: Scali, P.I.

Video.summary: Tony suspects the head of a shelter is murdering young runaways; Rachel takes an out-of-town job.
Video.title: Suffer The Children, Part 1

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall spend a frightening night in a remote mansion with a family of murder suspects.
Video.title: Night On Bald Mountain

Video.summary: Erik Estrada guest stars as a tough-minded detective who joins Hunter and McCall to catch a serial rapist.
Video.title: City Of Passion, Part 1

Video.summary: While grocery shopping, Rachel runs head-on into a robbery-murder suspect -- and becomes the target of the killer's threats.
Video.title: Witness

Video.summary: Tony sets out to trap a serial rapist whose victims are young blind women. Meanwhile, Rachel makes a surprising investment in art.
Video.title: Sight Unseen

Video.summary: A concert pianist is paralyzed by fear when a man jailed for her attempted murder is released from prison.
Video.title: Any Second Now

Video.summary: Tony recovers from an embarrassing accusation to tighten the investigation of Ennis; Rachel struggles with the conflicts of her new job.
Video.title: Suffer The Children, Part 2

Video.summary: McCall fails to report a felony, and Hunter tries to trap the killer of a teenage prostitute.
Video.title: City Of Passion, Part 3

Video.summary: Sergeant McCall poses as a fashion model to expose a burglary ring preying on wealthy businessmen.
Video.title: Double Exposure

Video.summary: After Tony's expensive new automobile is stolen from him at gunpoint, he and Cyd clash over the best way to capture Eastbridge's busiest carjackers.
Video.title: The Anti-Commish

Video.summary: A cynical federal drug agent interferes with Tony's investigation of the murder of a high school girl.
Video.title: Burned Out Case

Video.summary: A serial rapist known as Big Foot stalks McCall while Hunter investigates the death of a teenage prostitute.
Video.title: City Of Passion, Part 2

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall pose as spouses to investigate the murder of a girl whose death exposes a Soviet plot.
Video.title: The Girl Next Door

Video.summary: Racial tensions mount after the accidental shooting of the son of a Hispanic councilman by police.
Video.title: Flashpoint

Video.summary: Reno saddles up to help when a friend of Bobby's is injured after uncovering a group of cattle rustlers operating through a traveling rodeo.
Video.title: Rustlers' Rodeo

Video.summary: Reno finds himself an unwilling celebrity while in San Diego tracking a "rave" party coordinator who is responsible for the near death of a teenage party goer.
Video.title: The Late Shift

Video.summary: Reno finds himself as prey in the middle of a dangerous "hunt" after he and Bobby meet up with a former protege of Sixkiller Enterprises.
Video.title: Thrill Kill

Video.summary: When Reno locates a missing teen, he finds it nearly impossible to persuade her to leave her seemingly comfortable life as a high-priced call girl until a recent "graduate" is found murdered.
Video.title: Teen Angel

Video.summary: Reno and Cheyenne must pump themselves up when they go after a former weight lifter turned drug dealer
Video.title: Muscle Beach
